description: lib.rs:337-341 'for n in 1u16..=u16::MAX { if !used.contains(&n) { return Ok(NvmId::new(n)); } }'. Idiomatic: '(1u16..=u16::MAX).find(|n| !used.contains(n)).map(NvmId::new).ok_or_else(|| ...)'. Same complexity, reads as 'find the first free id' rather than 'iterate and decide'. P3 because it is taste with weak engineering basis.
title: find_free_id_from_list uses for-loop with early return; idiomatic Iterator::find
